# yabai.travel

> Endurance sports event information and logistics portal

## Overview
yabai.travel is a comprehensive information portal for endurance sports events including trail running, Spartan Race, HYROX, marathon, triathlon, obstacle course racing, cycling, and more.

## Features
- Race search with filters (sport type, date, distance, cost, location)
- Event details (course info, entry fees, time limits, required gear)
- Access & accommodation logistics (transport routes, estimated costs)
- Community features (Crew membership, feature requests)

## Data
- 570+ events tracked
- 1,700+ race categories
- Automatic data collection from official race websites
- Japanese and English bilingual

## API
No public API available at this time.

## Contact
Use the contact form at /legal
